mapper.select:
WITH base_t AS ( SELECT t.test_id, t.version_id, pv.project_id, p.project_name, pv.version_name, t.title, t.priority_code, t.test_type_code, t.status_code, t.assignee_id, t.created_by, t.description, t.start_date, t.end_date, t.created_at, t.updated_at, t.team_name FROM test t JOIN project_version pv ON t.version_id = pv.version_id JOIN project p ON pv.project_id = p.project_id
JOIN users assignee_filter ON t.assignee_id = assignee_filter.user_id
WHERE pv.project_id = #{projectId} AND p.owner_id = #{loginUserId}
AND p.project_name LIKE '%' || #{projectName} || '%'
AND pv.version_name LIKE '%' || #{versionName} || '%'
AND t.team_name LIKE '%' || #{teamName} || '%'
AND t.title LIKE '%' || #{title} || '%'
AND t.status_code = #{statusCode}
AND t.test_type_code = #{testTypeCode}
AND t.priority_code = #{priorityCode}
AND assignee_filter.user_name LIKE '%' || #{assigneeName} || '%'
), tc_count AS ( SELECT tcm.test_id, COUNT(*) AS total_case_count FROM test_case_mapping tcm JOIN base_t bt ON tcm.test_id = bt.test_id GROUP BY tcm.test_id ) SELECT bt.test_id AS "testId", bt.version_id AS "versionId", bt.project_id AS "projectId", bt.project_name AS "projectName", bt.version_name AS "versionName", bt.title AS "title",
bt.priority_code AS "priorityCode", CASE bt.priority_code WHEN 'c001' THEN '상' WHEN 'c002' THEN '중' WHEN 'c003' THEN '하' ELSE bt.priority_code END AS "priorityName",
bt.test_type_code AS "testTypeCode", CASE bt.test_type_code WHEN 'd001' THEN '기능' WHEN 'd002' THEN 'UI/UX' WHEN 'd003' THEN '성능' WHEN 'd004' THEN '보안' WHEN 'd005' THEN '데이터' WHEN 'd006' THEN '기타' ELSE bt.test_type_code END AS "testTypeName",
bt.status_code AS "statusCode", CASE bt.status_code WHEN 'a001' THEN '예정' WHEN 'a002' THEN '진행중' WHEN 'a003' THEN '종료' ELSE bt.status_code END AS "statusName",
bt.assignee_id AS "assigneeId", assignee.user_name AS "assigneeName", assignee.login_id AS "assigneeLoginId",
bt.created_by AS "createdBy", creator.user_name AS "createdByName", creator.login_id AS "createdByLoginId",
bt.description AS "description", TO_CHAR(bt.start_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "startDate", TO_CHAR(bt.end_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "endDate", TO_CHAR(bt.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "createdAt", TO_CHAR(bt.updated_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "updatedAt", bt.team_name AS "teamName",
NVL(tc_count.total_case_count, 0) AS "totalCaseCount",
0 AS "executionCount", 0 AS "successCount", 0 AS "failCount", 0 AS "holdCount", 0 AS "progressCount", 0 AS "progressRate"
FROM base_t bt LEFT JOIN users assignee ON bt.assignee_id = assignee.user_id LEFT JOIN users creator ON bt.created_by = creator.user_id LEFT JOIN tc_count ON bt.test_id = tc_count.test_id
ORDER BY bt.created_at DESC, bt.test_id DESC

WITH base_t AS ( SELECT t.test_id, t.version_id, pv.project_id, p.project_name, pv.version_name, t.title, t.priority_code, t.test_type_code, t.status_code, t.assignee_id, t.created_by, t.description, t.start_date, t.end_date, t.created_at, t.updated_at, t.team_name FROM test t JOIN project_version pv ON t.version_id = pv.version_id JOIN project p ON pv.project_id = p.project_id
JOIN users assignee_filter ON t.assignee_id = assignee_filter.user_id
WHERE pv.project_id = #{projectId}
AND p.project_name LIKE '%' || #{projectName} || '%'
AND pv.version_name LIKE '%' || #{versionName} || '%'
AND t.team_name LIKE '%' || #{teamName} || '%'
AND t.title LIKE '%' || #{title} || '%'
AND t.status_code = #{statusCode}
AND t.test_type_code = #{testTypeCode}
AND t.priority_code = #{priorityCode}
AND assignee_filter.user_name LIKE '%' || #{assigneeName} || '%'
), tc_count AS ( SELECT tcm.test_id, COUNT(*) AS total_case_count FROM test_case_mapping tcm JOIN base_t bt ON tcm.test_id = bt.test_id GROUP BY tcm.test_id ) SELECT bt.test_id AS "testId", bt.version_id AS "versionId", bt.project_id AS "projectId", bt.project_name AS "projectName", bt.version_name AS "versionName", bt.title AS "title",
bt.priority_code AS "priorityCode", CASE bt.priority_code WHEN 'c001' THEN '상' WHEN 'c002' THEN '중' WHEN 'c003' THEN '하' ELSE bt.priority_code END AS "priorityName",
bt.test_type_code AS "testTypeCode", CASE bt.test_type_code WHEN 'd001' THEN '기능' WHEN 'd002' THEN 'UI/UX' WHEN 'd003' THEN '성능' WHEN 'd004' THEN '보안' WHEN 'd005' THEN '데이터' WHEN 'd006' THEN '기타' ELSE bt.test_type_code END AS "testTypeName",
bt.status_code AS "statusCode", CASE bt.status_code WHEN 'a001' THEN '예정' WHEN 'a002' THEN '진행중' WHEN 'a003' THEN '종료' ELSE bt.status_code END AS "statusName",
bt.assignee_id AS "assigneeId", assignee.user_name AS "assigneeName", assignee.login_id AS "assigneeLoginId",
bt.created_by AS "createdBy", creator.user_name AS "createdByName", creator.login_id AS "createdByLoginId",
bt.description AS "description", TO_CHAR(bt.start_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "startDate", TO_CHAR(bt.end_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "endDate", TO_CHAR(bt.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "createdAt", TO_CHAR(bt.updated_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "updatedAt", bt.team_name AS "teamName",
NVL(tc_count.total_case_count, 0) AS "totalCaseCount",
0 AS "executionCount", 0 AS "successCount", 0 AS "failCount", 0 AS "holdCount", 0 AS "progressCount", 0 AS "progressRate"
FROM base_t bt LEFT JOIN users assignee ON bt.assignee_id = assignee.user_id LEFT JOIN users creator ON bt.created_by = creator.user_id LEFT JOIN tc_count ON bt.test_id = tc_count.test_id
ORDER BY bt.created_at DESC, bt.test_id DESC

SELECT pv.version_id AS "versionId", pv.project_id AS "projectId", pv.version_name AS "versionName" FROM project_version pv WHERE pv.project_id = #{projectId} ORDER BY pv.default_yn DESC, pv.created_at DESC

SELECT DISTINCT u.user_id AS "userId", u.login_id AS "loginId", u.user_name AS "userName" FROM project_member pm JOIN team_member tm ON pm.team_member_id = tm.team_member_id JOIN users u ON tm.user_id = u.user_id WHERE pm.project_id = #{projectId} ORDER BY u.user_name ASC, u.login_id ASC

SELECT DISTINCT pg.project_group_id AS "groupId", pg.group_name AS "groupName" FROM project_member pm JOIN project_group pg ON pm.project_group_id = pg.project_group_id WHERE pm.project_id = #{projectId} AND pm.project_group_id IS NOT NULL ORDER BY pg.group_name ASC
mapper.insert:
SELECT 'TEST_' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMM') || '_' || LPAD( NVL(( SELECT MAX(TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(test_id, -4))) + 1 FROM test WHERE test_id LIKE 'TEST_' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMM') || '_%' ), 1), 4, '0' ) FROM dual
INSERT INTO test ( test_id, version_id, title, priority_code, test_type_code, status_code, assignee_id, description, start_date, end_date, created_by, created_at, updated_at, team_name ) VALUES ( #{testId}, #{versionId}, #{title}, #{priorityCode}, #{testTypeCode}, #{statusCode}, #{assigneeId}, #{description}, TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), #{createdBy}, SYSDATE, NULL, #{teamName} )

INSERT INTO test_case_mapping ( mapping_id, test_id, test_case_id, sort_order )
SELECT 'TCM_' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMM') || '_' || LPAD( NVL(( SELECT MAX(TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(mapping_id, -4))) FROM test_case_mapping WHERE mapping_id LIKE 'TCM_' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMM') || '_%' ), 0) + #{index} + 1, 4, '0' ) AS mapping_id, #{testId} AS test_id, #{testCaseId} AS test_case_id, #{index} + 1 AS sort_order FROM dual
mapper.select:
SELECT tc.test_case_id AS "testCaseId", tc.version_id AS "versionId", pv.version_name AS "versionName",
tc.title AS "title",
tc.test_type_code AS "testTypeCode", CASE tc.test_type_code WHEN 'd001' THEN '기능' WHEN 'd002' THEN 'UI/UX' WHEN 'd003' THEN '성능' WHEN 'd004' THEN '보안' WHEN 'd005' THEN '데이터' WHEN 'd006' THEN '기타' ELSE tc.test_type_code END AS "testTypeName",
tc.status_code AS "statusCode", CASE tc.status_code WHEN 'g001' THEN '활성' WHEN 'g002' THEN '비활성' ELSE tc.status_code END AS "statusName",
tc.priority_code AS "priorityCode", CASE tc.priority_code WHEN 'c001' THEN '상' WHEN 'c002' THEN '중' WHEN 'c003' THEN '하' ELSE tc.priority_code END AS "priorityName",
tc.expected_result AS "expectedResult"
FROM test_case_mapping tcm JOIN test_case tc ON tcm.test_case_id = tc.test_case_id JOIN project_version pv ON tc.version_id = pv.version_id
WHERE tcm.test_id = #{testId}
ORDER BY tcm.sort_order ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE test SET version_id = #{versionId}, title = #{title}, priority_code = #{priorityCode}, test_type_code = #{testTypeCode}, status_code = #{statusCode}, assignee_id = #{assigneeId}, description = #{description}, start_date = TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), end_date = TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), updated_at = SYSDATE, team_name = #{teamName} WHERE test_id = #{testId}
